_comment: Canonical source of truth for SSL certificate pins (Iteration 1 - NewDot). Regenerate with scripts/generateCertificatePins.sh. Each domain pins the leaf SPKI hash (primary) and its issuing intermediate CA SPKI hash (durable backup that survives leaf rotation). Hashes are base64-encoded SHA-256 of the Subject Public Key Info. Native code (Android network_security_config_enforce.xml, Android OkHttpClientFactory, iOS TrustKit) MUST be kept in sync with this file - the generation script prints the values for each target.

www.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Let's Encrypt YE1 intermediate

secure.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Let's Encrypt YE1 intermediate

new.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Google Trust Services WE1 intermediate

integrations.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=integrations.expensify.com + Let's Encrypt R13 intermediate

travel.expensify.com.notes: leaf + Google Trust Services WE1 intermediate

staging.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Let's Encrypt YE1 intermediate

staging-secure.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Let's Encrypt YE1 intermediate

staging.new.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=expensify.com + Google Trust Services WE1 intermediate

staging.travel.expensify.com.notes: leaf CN=staging.travel.expensify.com + Google Trust Services WE1 intermediate
